item.title: Shape and color
item.description: Visual Contrast shape contrast: simple, complex, large(/simple), Vertical(Horizontal), narrow(broad). shallow(deep), moving(static), light(dark), soft(hard), light(heavy), volume. Marks, Icons and Symbols Icon(pictorial represents actual things, easy to read), Symbol. Figure/Ground Figure, Ground(Background), think about them perspectively. Negative/Positive, create depth. Both scale and tonality can affect the depth. Color color indicates emotional response. color: HUE, rainbow, value(light to dark), saturation(dull to intense).
